reviews.review_description: I really like the look and atmosphere, but I really don't like the gorilla tag style movement as I feel that this takes away from the experience.  Could standard navigational controls please be added? As I would happily rate five stars for this game, especially given that it's free.  Please let me know if this is being considered.  Thanks.
I cant join public lobby's but i started today so it isn't down right? Any Devs please reach out to me if you fixed this problem. Thank you!

I was excited too play this game after seeing a video on it. But the movement iis trash and you can barely get anywhere in the game. Also multiplayer doesn't work even though it was shown as it working. Visuals were okay it looked better in the trailer. Do better, fix your game.

Good game but confusing and buggy it’s got a lot of potential-four stars.

Hey it’s got good potential but, the monsters and servers are very buggy, the gameplay overall is bad quality, 

BUT the maps and visuals are ok, great audio choice for the style of the game, If I were a dev for this game, I would start with fixing stuff before adding more.

MAIN PROBLEM: No smooth/snap turn, more than half of vr players use this mechanic, and without it, the game is UNPLAYABLE for most people.

Sub to ZilophVR :)

developer_response.body: It is because the multiplayer that I am using for the game has a limit of 100 hours per month so when the 100 hours has been reached it stops the multiplayer from working and you have to wait until the end of the month when it resets but I am currently trying to fix it so it should hopefully be fixed very soon! Thanks for the feedback and playing the game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review but i would like to say a few things! First of you don't need to hate on the game if you don't like it don't bother playing! If you have any suggestions on what to add or improve tell me and i can make it better! I am also still kind of new to making games and I'm still learning more! You just need to give it time for when i get better! You don't need to hate on the game and call me lazy just tell me what to improve!

I have played almost every Gorilla Tag Horror game there is, whilst there are some things which could improve, it is nonetheless a fantastic game! First off, it is very unique and scary at the same time. Secondly, the maps are wonderful and nice to play in. Lastly, the in-game music wraps up the whole game nicely. However, there are some critics that I’d like to point out. I will list them here
• No floor sounds
• Maps on top of each other (I can see people floating in different maps)
• Audio problems (I can hear people to the right of me when they are in fact on the left of me)
• Them monster being in different places for everyone
